creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jkim
Date: Wed Jan  8 20:39:22 2014
New Revision: 339172
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/339172

Log:
  - Update to 1.9.3 and convert NOPORTDOCS to options framework. [1]
  - Support staging.
  
  PR:		ports/185588 [1]

Modified:
  head/devel/apache-ant/Makefile
  head/devel/apache-ant/distinfo
  head/devel/apache-ant/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/apache-ant/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/apache-ant/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 20:25:50 2014	(r339171)
+++ head/devel/apache-ant/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 20:39:22 2014	(r339172)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	apache-ant
-PORTVERSION=	1.8.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.9.3
 CATEGORIES=	devel java
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_APACHE:S,%SUBDIR%/,ant/binaries/:bin,} \
 		LOCAL/hq:man
@@ -17,6 +17,8 @@ LICENSE=	APACHE20
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	classpath:${PORTSDIR}/java/javavmwrapper
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 ANT_DISTFILE=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-bin.tar.bz2
 MANPAGE_DISTFILE=	${PORTNAME}-manpage-${MANPAGE_VERSION}.tgz
 MANPAGE_VERSION=	20030908
@@ -29,7 +31,9 @@ DATADIR=	${JAVASHAREDIR}/${PORTNAME}
 
 READMES=	LICENSE README WHATSNEW
 
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 DISTFILES+=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-manual.tar.bz2:doc
 MASTER_SITES+=	${MASTER_SITE_APACHE:S,%SUBDIR%/,ant/manual/:doc,}
 PORTDOCS=	*
@@ -40,42 +44,38 @@ WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVER
 MANPAGE_SUBDIR=	apache-ant-manpage
 MANPAGE_WRKSRC=	${WRKSRC}/${MANPAGE_SUBDIR}
 
-MAN1=		ant.1
-MAN5=		build.xml.5
-
 SUB_FILES=	ant.sh
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-extract:
 	@${TAR} -C ${WRKSRC} -xzf ${DISTDIR}/${MANPAGE_DISTFILE}
 
 do-install:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing scripts..."
-	@${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}/bin
-	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/ant.sh ${PREFIX}/bin/ant
-	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/antRun ${DATADIR}/bin/
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/bin
+	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/ant.sh ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/ant
+	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/antRun ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/bin/
 	@${ECHO_MSG} " [ DONE ]"
 
 .for d in etc lib
 	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing data directory '${d}'..."
-	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} ${d} ${DATADIR}/
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} ${d} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/
 	@${ECHO_MSG} " [ DONE ]"
 .endfor
 
 	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing manpages..."
-	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${MANPAGE_WRKSRC}/ant.1 ${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
-	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${MANPAGE_WRKSRC}/build.xml.5 ${MAN5PREFIX}/man/man5
+	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${MANPAGE_WRKSRC}/ant.1 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man1
+	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${MANPAGE_WRKSRC}/build.xml.5 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man5
 	@${ECHO_MSG} " [ DONE ]"
 
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 
 	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing readme files..."
-	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${READMES:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${READMES:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 	@${ECHO_MSG} " [ DONE ]"
 
 	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing documentation files..."
-	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} manual ${DOCSDIR}/
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} manual ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/
 	@${ECHO_MSG} " [ DONE ]"
 .endif
 

Modified: head/devel/apache-ant/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/apache-ant/distinfo	Wed Jan  8 20:25:50 2014	(r339171)
+++ head/devel/apache-ant/distinfo	Wed Jan  8 20:39:22 2014	(r339172)
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
-SHA256 (apache-ant-1.8.4-bin.tar.bz2) = aeaed7d5c2b1e73ffc195d713931047ecc113b8c9844df5cbac2797007455069
-SIZE (apache-ant-1.8.4-bin.tar.bz2) = 4257152
+SHA256 (apache-ant-1.9.3-bin.tar.bz2) = ca14a31b2b47edd069624520f64957ad502c0905421da5f46dd41229b8ba4cbf
+SIZE (apache-ant-1.9.3-bin.tar.bz2) = 4320310
 SHA256 (apache-ant-manpage-20030908.tgz) = 721981f64fae3577c04c527232edab9bfa0755af08319049cec206584dc8830c
 SIZE (apache-ant-manpage-20030908.tgz) = 9735
-SHA256 (apache-ant-1.8.4-manual.tar.bz2) = d3f47ee52f9b8e75279d259106232da9c3919fb7ea9f9e48bd3f2c7a0303716e
-SIZE (apache-ant-1.8.4-manual.tar.bz2) = 1875282
+SHA256 (apache-ant-1.9.3-manual.tar.bz2) = 0e0cbeea81967fb965050eb2b5a917fc96d14d9d94be7584f38c2b5e4d01825e
+SIZE (apache-ant-1.9.3-manual.tar.bz2) = 1911505

Modified: head/devel/apache-ant/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/apache-ant/pkg-plist	Wed Jan  8 20:25:50 2014	(r339171)
+++ head/devel/apache-ant/pkg-plist	Wed Jan  8 20:39:22 2014	(r339172)
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 @comment $FreeBSD$
 bin/ant
+man/man1/ant.1.gz
+man/man5/build.xml.5.gz
 %%DATADIR%%/bin/antRun
 %%DATADIR%%/etc/ant-bootstrap.jar
 %%DATADIR%%/etc/changelog.xsl
